emptyDescription: Create a category to start adding bookmarks.
noResultsDescription: No bookmarks found for "{query}". Try changing your search or resetting it.
reorderCategoriesError: Failed to reorder categories. Please try again.
reorderBookmarksError: Failed to reorder bookmarks. Please try again.
foundCount: Found {count, plural, one {# bookmark} few {# bookmarks} many {# bookmarks} other {# bookmarks}}
urlInvalidError: Enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.
iconPlaceholder: Emoji, icon name, or image URL
suggestFaviconError: Failed to find an icon for this URL.
saveBookmarkError: Failed to save bookmark. Please try again.
hasChildrenHelperText: This category has subcategories, so it cannot become a subcategory of another category.
saveCategoryError: Failed to save category. Please try again.
deleteWithSubcategoriesDescription: This category contains {directCount, plural, one {# bookmark} few {# bookmarks} many {# bookmarks} other {# bookmarks}} and {subcategoryCount, plural, one {# subcategory} few {# subcategories} many {# subcategories} other {# subcategories}} (containing {nestedBookmarkCount, plural, one {# more bookmark} few {# more bookmarks} many {# more bookmarks} other {# more bookmarks}}). Deleting it will remove all of this. This action cannot be undone.
deleteBookmarksOnlyDescription: This category contains {directCount, plural, one {# bookmark} few {# bookmarks} many {# bookmarks} other {# bookmarks}}. Deleting the category will also delete all bookmarks inside it. This action cannot be undone.
deleteEmptyCategoryDescription: This category is empty. This action cannot be undone.
deleteCategoryToastWithSubcategories: The category, {subcategoryCount, plural, one {# subcategory} few {# subcategories} many {# subcategories} other {# subcategories}}, and {totalBookmarkCount, plural, one {# bookmark} few {# bookmarks} many {# bookmarks} other {# bookmarks}} inside them have been deleted.
deleteCategoryToastBookmarksOnly: The category and {directCount, plural, one {# bookmark} few {# bookmarks} many {# bookmarks} other {# bookmarks}} inside it have been deleted.
deleteCategoryError: Failed to delete category. Please try again.
deleteBookmarkDescription: This bookmark will be permanently deleted.
deleteBookmarkError: Failed to delete bookmark. Please try again.
